title: Exchange Rate, Productivity and Exports: The Case of Indian Textile Sector

summary.about: How exchange rates, prices and productivity influence Indian textile and apparel exports.
summary.audience: Textile exporters, monetary policymakers and trade economists.
summary.method: Uses long-run cointegration, Granger causality, impulse responses and variance decomposition on historical data.
summary.insights: Exchange rates and export prices have clear long-run links to exports; productivity’s role is present but less conclusive.
